title: tamus communis subsp. cretica
intro: Tamus communis subsp. cretica, also known as the Cretan tamus, is a subspecies of the tamus communis plant, a type of perennial vine that belongs to the family Asparagaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tamus communis subsp. cretica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, or it is extracted into a tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
